notes: A foreign-facility CGMP warning letter pressuring three CFR-cited violations in nested form, a five-item sub-list of missing CGMP records under violation 3, an FEI number, ATTN/contact email, signatory and title, two pre-letter event dates (704(a)(4) request and Import Alert 66-40 placement), inspection dates, a Form FDA 483 response date with inadequacy findings on each of the three violations, and (b)(4) redaction markers. Useful for testing nested headings, ordered citation lists, response-status distinctions, redacted-detail handling, and multi-leg chronology arithmetic spanning two calendar years.
